פרטי המסעדה
];

// ─── Database connection ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const AppDataSource = new DataSource({
  type: 'postgres',
  host:     process.env.DB_HOST,
  port:     Number(process.env.DB_PORT) || 5432,
  username: process.env.DB_USER,
  password: process.env.DB_PASS,
  database: process.env.DB_NAME,
  ssl: process.env.DB_SSL === 'true' ? { rejectUnauthorized: false } : false,
  entities: [Restaurant, Destination],
  synchronize: false,
  logging: false,
});

// ─── Geocoding — Nominatim / OpenStreetMap (100% free) ───────────────────────

const DELAY_MS   = 1100; // Nominatim ToS: never exceed 1 req/sec
const USER_AGENT = 'JewishOnTheWay/1.0 (meryl.hasid@gmail.com)';

let lastRequestAt = 0;

async function rateLimit(): Promise<void> {
  const wait = DELAY_MS - (Date.now() - lastRequestAt);
  if (wait > 0) await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, wait));
  lastRequestAt = Date.now();
}

async function nominatimSearch(query: string): Promise<{ lat: number; lng: number } | null> {
  await rateLimit();
  try {
    const res = await axios.get('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search', {
      params:  { q: query, format: 'json', limit: 1, addressdetails: 0 },
      headers: { 'User-Agent': USER_AGENT, 'Accept-Language': 'en' },
      timeout: 12_000,
    });
    const hits: Array<{ lat: string; lon: string }> = res.data;
    if (!hits?.length) return null;
    return { lat: parseFloat(hits[0].lat), lng: parseFloat(hits[0].lon) };
  } catch (err: any) {
    console.warn(`    ↳ Nominatim error for "${query}": ${err.message}`);
    return null;
  }
}

/**
 * 5-strategy geocoding cascade — tries progressively broader queries until
 * one returns a result. Returns null only if all strategies fail.
 */
async function geocode(
  name: string,
  address: string,
  city: string,
  country: string,
): Promise<{ lat: number; lng: number } | null> {
  const strategies = [
    `${address}, ${city}, ${country}`,          // 1. full address
    `${name}, ${address}, ${city}`,              // 2. name + address + city
    `${name}, ${city}, ${country}`,              // 3. name + city + country
    `${address}, ${city}`,                       // 4. address + city (no country)
    `${city}, ${country}`,                       // 5. city + country fallback
  ];

  for (let i = 0; i < strategies.length; i++) {
    const result = await nominatimSearch(strategies[i]);
    if (result) {
      if (i > 0) console.log(`    ↳ geocoded with strategy ${i + 1}: "${strategies[i]}"`);
      return result;
    }
  }
  return null;
}

// ─── Destination cache (avoid repeated DB lookups) ────────────────────────────

const destinationCache = new Map<string, Destination | null>();

async function findDestination(
  repo: ReturnType<typeof AppDataSource.getRepository<Destination>>,
  name: string,
): Promise<Destination | null> {
  const key = name.toLowerCase().trim();
  if (destinationCache.has(key)) return destinationCache.get(key)!;

  const dest = await repo
    .createQueryBuilder('d')
    .where('LOWER(d.name) = :name', { name: key })
    .getOne();

  destinationCache.set(key, dest ?? null);
  return dest ?? null;
}

// ─── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

async function main() {
  if (RESTAURANTS.length === 0) {
    console.log('No restaurants in the RESTAURANTS array. Add your data and re-run.');
    process.exit(0);
  }

  await AppDataSource.initialize();
  console.log('✅ Connected to database\n');

  const restaurantsRepo  = AppDataSource.getRepository(Restaurant);
  const destinationsRepo = AppDataSource.getRepository(Destination);

  let imported = 0;
  let skipped  = 0;
  let failed   = 0;
  const errors: string[] = [];

  for (const item of RESTAURANTS) {
    process.stdout.write(`→ "${item.name}" (${item.city}, ${item.country})... `);

    // 1. Find destination by name
    const destination = await findDestination(destinationsRepo, item.destinationName);
    if (!destination) {
      console.log(`❌ destination "${item.destinationName}" not found in DB`);
      errors.push(`Destination not found: "${item.destinationName}" for "${item.name}"`);
      failed++;
      continue;
    }

    // 2. Duplicate check: same name + city
    const existing = await restaurantsRepo.findOne({
      where: { name: item.name, city: item.city },
    });
    if (existing) {
      console.log('⏭  already exists');
      skipped++;
      continue;
    }

    // 3. Geocode with 5-strategy cascade (Nominatim, 100% free)
    const coords = await geocode(item.name, item.address, item.city, item.country);
    if (!coords) {
      console.log('❌ geocoding failed (all 5 strategies)');
      errors.push(`Geocoding failed: "${item.name}", ${item.address}, ${item.city}, ${item.country}`);
      failed++;
      continue;
    }

    // 4. Save — distance is NEVER stored; PostGIS calculates it live from
    //    ST_Distance(location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(lng,lat),4326)::geography)
    await restaurantsRepo.save(
      restaurantsRepo.create({
        name:           item.name,
        address:        item.address,
        city:           item.city,
        country:        item.country,
        phone:          item.phone,
        kashrutLevel:   item.kashrutLevel,
        restaurantType: item.foodType === 'unknown' ? null : item.foodType,
        category:       item.category,
        isKosher:       true,
        lat:            coords.lat,
        lng:            coords.lng,
        geocodedAt:     new Date(),
        // GeoJSON: coordinates must be [longitude, latitude]
        location: { type: 'Point', coordinates: [coords.lng, coords.lat] },
        destination,
      }),
    );

    console.log(`✅ lat=${coords.lat.toFixed(5)}, lng=${coords.lng.toFixed(5)}`);
    imported++;
  }

  await AppDataSource.destroy();

  console.log('\n─────────────────────────────────────────');
  console.log(`  Imported : ${imported}`);
  console.log(`  Skipped  : ${skipped}  (duplicates)`);
  console.log(`  Failed   : ${failed}   (destination not found or geocoding failed)`);
  if (errors.length) {
    console.log('\nErrors:');
    errors.forEach(e => console.log(`  • ${e}`));
  }
  console.log('─────────────────────────────────────────');
}

main().catch(err => {
  console.error('Fatal:', err.message);
  process.exit(1);
});
